template_exercises_reps_range_check.name: template_exercises_reps_range_check
template_exercises_reps_range_check.value: "template_exercises"."reps_min" is null or "template_exercises"."reps_max" is null or "template_exercises"."reps_min" <= "template_exercises"."reps_max"

workout_sessions_completed_at_check.name: workout_sessions_completed_at_check
workout_sessions_completed_at_check.value: ("workout_sessions"."status" != 'completed' or "workout_sessions"."completed_at" is not null) and ("workout_sessions"."completed_at" is null or "workout_sessions"."completed_at" >= "workout_sessions"."started_at")
